hero.desc: 8848 Momo House treats momo lovers to a unique Oriental Fusion menu featuring tender, plump Nepalese dumplings stuffed with authentic and creative fillings.

momoste.title: MOMOSTE!
momoste.subtitle: Good times and tasty food!
momoste.body: Our oriental fusion menu will surprise and excite your tastebuds. You will find yourself coming back for another tummy-full of our warmth, hospitality and fun.
momoste.whyBody: That is the height of Mt Everest in Nepal, the earth's highest mountain above sea level, and what inspires us every day to aim for the highest heights of hospitality.
momoste.noteRest: is our tongue-in-cheek spin on Namaste. Expect to hear it a lot around our house.

roots.lead: 8848 Momo House is the invention of Hom Pyashi, Nepali and proud new Aussie.
roots.body: Homesick and craving his familiar comfort foods, Hom built a restaurant our Nepalese friends instantly love, and our Aussie mates have discovered as a brand new cuisine that's tickling their tastebuds.

posts.title: New menu now available instore!
posts.excerpt: We are very pleased to announce the arrival of our brand new menu. It's momolicious.

posts.title: Momo in Perth
posts.excerpt: 8848 Momo House Perth is getting closer, bringing the taste of Nepal to more momo lovers.

yak.body: Join the Momoste Club and we will show you the extra special VIP treatment you deserve. You will be the first to receive event invites, announcements, unique discounts and offers.
